name: Wonder Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour an 8 1/2 X 4 1/2 inch loaf pan.
Cream sugar, shortening, and almond paste until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolks.
Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together. Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, starting and ending with flour. Add vanilla extract. Beat until smooth.
Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks. Gradually beat in 3 tablespoons sugar. Beat until egg whites are stiff but not dry.
Beat 1/4 of the egg whites into batter. Fold batter into remaining egg whites carefully, being sure not to overmix.
Remove 1/2 cup batter and mix well with cocoa. Pour plain batter into prepared pan. Spoon chocolate batter in blobs and marbleize with a knife or spatula. Sprinkle with almonds.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until golden brown and cake has shrunk from the sides of the pan. Cool on wire rack before turning out.
